items.name: Prometheus
items.note: Primary metrics platform — JVM heap, DICOM throughput, Kubernetes pod health, VNA storage capacity. ZeroOps ingests all Prometheus alerts and correlates to single incidents.

items.name: Datadog
items.note: APM and log monitoring — HL7 message queue depth, FHIR API latency, RUBEE orchestrator performance. Primary source for HL7 and integration alerts.

items.name: Dynatrace
items.note: Full-stack observability — PACS application performance, RUBEE thread pool, CVE vulnerability detection. Complements Prometheus for application-layer insights.

items.name: Elasticsearch
items.note: Log aggregation — DICOM receiver thread dumps, HL7 consumer logs, Kubernetes pod events. RCA Engine queries Elasticsearch for historical pattern matching.

items.name: ServiceNow
items.agent: Alert Correlator, Remediation Agent, Change Validator
items.note: AGFA's ITSM system of record. ZeroOps auto-creates incidents, updates status at each remediation step and auto-closes on resolution. Full audit trail in ServiceNow. HiTL approvals delivered via ServiceNow tasks.

items.name: Kubernetes
items.note: Container orchestration — PACS rolling restarts, FHIR API pod management, RUBEE scaling. All ZeroOps remediation actions execute via Kubernetes API. Zero-downtime rolling restart strategy applied.

items.name: Ansible
items.note: Infrastructure automation — VM configuration, network maintenance validation, post-maintenance config verification. Complements Kubernetes for non-containerised components.

items.name: Azure DevOps / Jenkins
items.note: CI/CD pipeline integration — Problem Management code fixes handed to Jenkins/Azure DevOps for deployment. ZeroOps triggers pipeline and monitors handoff. Control passed to AGFA release management.

items.name: IMPAX/EI App Server
items.agent: RCA Engine, Remediation Agent, Log Analyzer
items.note: Core PACS application — DICOM image storage, retrieval and distribution across 6 hospital sites. JVM heap monitoring active. Rolling restart auto-approved at risk score 18.

items.name: DICOM Router
items.note: Routes DICOM studies to correct reading stations. AE title mapping validation against CMDB baseline after every maintenance window. Misrouting auto-corrected.

items.name: Compression Engine
items.note: DICOM image compression — worker thread pool monitoring. Auto-rebalance triggered when throughput drops below 80% baseline.

items.name: Worklist Engine
items.note: Radiologist worklist distribution — queue depth monitoring at 1,000 study threshold. Auto-rebalance across reading stations in under 5 minutes.

items.name: RUBEE Orchestrator
items.note: Clinical workflow orchestration — worklist scheduling, priority routing, radiologist assignment. Thread pool saturation monitoring. Auto-scale config managed by ZeroOps.

items.name: FHIR R4 API
items.note: HL7 FHIR interoperability layer — /ImagingStudy endpoint monitored for 503 errors and OOMKill events. Pod restart auto-approved at risk score 12.

items.name: HL7 Gateway
items.agent: Alert Correlator, RCA Engine, Remediation Agent
items.note: Patient data integration — ADT and ORM message routing across all hospital sites. Consumer thread deadlock monitoring. Gateway restart requires HiTL approval — patient data flow impact.

items.name: Multi-Tenant API Gateway
items.note: API gateway for hospital tenant namespaces. Rate limiter config drift detection — auto-corrected on divergence from GitOps baseline.

items.name: VNA (DICOM Store)
items.note: Long-term DICOM study archive — partition capacity monitored at 80%/90%/95% thresholds. Emergency Azure Blob tier migration auto-triggered at 90%. Current rate 2.4 TB/day.

items.name: Long-Term Archive (PostgreSQL)
items.note: PostgreSQL-backed long-term archive. Replication slot monitoring — inactive slots dropped automatically to prevent WAL accumulation. Replication lag SLA: 5 seconds.

items.name: Azure Monitor
items.note: Azure-hosted components — Archive VNA, Radiology AI, Enterprise Applications. Resource utilisation trending and breach prediction.

items.name: AI Inference Engine
items.note: GPU-accelerated radiology AI — auto-triage and anomaly detection. GPU memory fragmentation monitoring — scheduled restart at 72h uptime. Inference latency SLA: 200ms.

items.name: Keycloak IAM
items.note: Identity and access management — SSO, token refresh, role assignment. Auth success rate monitoring > 99.9%. Service Request auto-fulfilment for standard role assignments.

items.name: SAP ERP (Azure)
items.note: SAP ERP on Azure — work process monitoring, dialog pool health. Hosted in Azure; AGFA enterprise applications scope.
